% check a.php
a.php:11:2: $name is of type: string (DEBUG)
a.php:17:2: $n is of type: string (DEBUG)

% check b.php
b.php:14:2: $item is of type: App\Item (DEBUG)

-- a.php --
<?php

class Foo
{
	/** @var string[] */
	public $names;
}

$foo = new Foo;
foreach ($foo->names as $name) {
	#debugType $name
}

foreach (['this', 'will', 'not', 'work'] as $s);

foreach ($foo->names as $index => &$n) {
	#debugType $n
}

foreach ($foo->names as [$bar, $baz]);

foreach ($foo->names as $xx[$bar]);

foreach ($tokens as $this->position => $token);

-- b.php --
<?php
namespace App;

class Item {}

class Box
{
	/** @var Item[] */
	public $items;
}

$box = new Box;
foreach ($box->items as $item) {
	#debugType $item
}
